headline: Morgan Stanley: AI Spending Could Hit $1.4 Trillion by 2028, But 60% Leaves the US
summary: Morgan Stanley just raised its AI spending forecast to a staggering new ceiling, but the firm's own analysts warn that most of those dollars never actually stay in the American economy.

headline: Your Dividend Calendar for July 27–31: 10 Stocks and the Last Day to Buy Each One
summary: Ten dividend stocks all hit their ex-dates in the same four-day stretch, but missing even one buy-by deadline locks you out of the payment entirely. The yields, payout coverage, and last-day-to-buy deadlines vary widely across these names.
